---
name: Design / UX Feedback
about: Share usability findings, UI bugs, or design suggestions
title: "[Design]: "
labels: design, triage
assignees: []
---

## Summary

Describe the design or UX feedback.

## Current Experience

Detail what the user sees or experiences today. Include screenshots or recordings if possible.

## Desired Experience

Explain the behavior, layout, or interaction you would like to see.

## Users Impacted

Who encounters this issue or would benefit from the improvement?

## Severity

* [ ] Blocks task completion
* [ ] Causes confusion
* [ ] Cosmetic issue

## Supporting Evidence

Link to analytics, user research, or other data.

## Additional Context

Add mockups, references, or related issues.
